req.title: Wire transfer
req.statement: A customer shall initiate a wire transfer requiring two-factor authentication; transfers above $100,000 require manual review.

doc.reasoning: Wire transfer initiation requires 2FA verification (fresh within 5min) and conditional manual review for high-value transfers (>$100k). Test suite covers: (1) positive case with valid 2FA and transfer within threshold, (2) negative case with stale 2FA, (3) boundary case at $100k threshold triggering manual review. Heuristics applied: EP partitions by amount thresholds, BVA tests boundary at $100k, NEG exercises auth failure, STC validates state transitions (2FA→queued/review), DT combines 2FA freshness and amount conditions.

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_valid_2fa_under_threshold
trace: R-FIN-006: wire transfer initiated with valid 2FA
R-FIN-006: amount $50k below manual review threshold
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def test_wire_transfer_valid_2fa_under_threshold(base_url, valid_token):
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {valid_token}"}
    payload = {
        "amount": 50000,
        "currency": "USD",
        "beneficiary_account": "DE89370400440532013000",
        "2fa_verified_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/transfers/wire",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers,
        timeout=10
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    body = resp.json()
    assert "wire_id" in body
    assert body["state"] == "queued"
    assert "compliance_check_id" in body

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_stale_2fa_returns_401
actions: POST /transfers/wire with bearer token from stale 2FA
Payload includes 2fa_verified_at timestamp 10 minutes in past
expected: Response body contains error message referencing 5-minute window
trace: R-FIN-006: precondition '2fa verified in last 5 min' violated
R-FIN-006: error pathway '401 when 2fa stale' executed
R-FIN-006: wire transfer rejected due to stale authentication
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def test_wire_transfer_stale_2fa_returns_401(base_url, valid_token):
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {valid_token}"}
    stale_time = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(minutes=10)
    payload = {
        "amount": 75000,
        "currency": "USD",
        "beneficiary_account": "DE89370400440532013000",
        "2fa_verified_at": stale_time.isoformat()
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/transfers/wire",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers,
        timeout=10
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 401
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["error_code"] == "2fa_expired"
    assert "5 minute" in body["error_message"].lower()
    assert "wire_id" not in body

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_at_boundary_100k_triggers_manual_review
trace: R-FIN-006: error pathway '202 when manual review required' executed
R-FIN-006: expected outcome 'compliance check started' achieved
R-FIN-006: wire transitioned to manual review state
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime

def test_wire_transfer_at_boundary_100k_triggers_manual_review(base_url, valid_token):
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {valid_token}"}
    payload = {
        "amount": 100000,
        "currency": "USD",
        "beneficiary_account": "DE89370400440532013000",
        "2fa_verified_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/transfers/wire",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers,
        timeout=10
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 202
    body = resp.json()
    assert "wire_id" in body
    assert body["state"] == "pending_manual_review"
    assert "compliance_check_id" in body

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_above_threshold_requires_review
trace: R-FIN-006: amount exceeds $100k manual review threshold
R-FIN-006: wire queued for compliance officer review
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime

def test_wire_transfer_above_threshold_requires_review(base_url, valid_token):
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {valid_token}"}
    payload = {
        "amount": 150000,
        "currency": "USD",
        "beneficiary_account": "DE89370400440532013000",
        "2fa_verified_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/transfers/wire",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers,
        timeout=10
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 202
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["state"] == "pending_manual_review"
    assert "compliance_check_id" in body

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_without_2fa_credential_rejected
preconditions: No valid 2FA credential provided in request
actions: Omit Authorization header or provide invalid token
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime

def test_wire_transfer_without_2fa_credential_rejected(base_url):
    payload = {
        "amount": 50000,
        "currency": "USD",
        "beneficiary_account": "DE89370400440532013000"
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/transfers/wire",
        json=payload,
        headers={},
        timeout=10
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 401
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["error_code"] == "2fa_required"
